contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Autopilot gas_deploy_project capability tool (PR-final-2)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/61
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/241
  
  Details:
  Autopilot gas_deploy_project capability tool — PR-final-2, 2026-05-29.
  
  Closes PR-final-2 from TOKENOMICS_GAS_RESTRUCTURE_PLAN.md §5. Original PR sequence now complete (PR-0 + PR-1 + PR-1b + PR-1c + PR-1d + PR-1e + PR-1f + PR-final-1 + PR-final-2 all merged). Operator can now drive a single-project GAS deploy from Telegram: governor asks 'deploy <scriptId>', autopilot runs sync → clasp push → post-push hooks.
  
  EC2 deploy held intentionally per Gary — autopilot was mid-task on operator work; ./scripts/deploy.sh whenever Gary picks a quiet moment, then the tool runs on the prod service. Code merged to truesight_autopilot main; service stays on whatever was last deployed until then.
  
  PRs delivered:
  
  1. truesight_autopilot#61 — app/tools/gas_deploy_project.py is a thin handler over tokenomics/scripts/deploy_gas_project.py. Conservative defaults: push=False (dry-run), with_hooks=False even when push=True (so first real-world deploy fires clasp push but skips firing post_push_hooks until the governor confirms the push landed). Candidate cache-refresh hooks NEVER fired automatically. Refuses to run if tokenomics checkout is missing — clear error pointing at GAS_DEPLOY_TOKENOMICS_ROOT env var. TOOL_SPEC wired into the capability manifest; gas_deploy_project added to the infrastructure (SRE) role tools list next to deploy_autopilot. scripts/deploy.sh extended with a tokenomics-clone block parallel to the agentic_ai_context one so the runtime prereq lands automatically on next deploy. 11 new unit tests covering the script_id-required path, no-tokenomics-checkout path, dry-run / push / push+hooks command shapes, with_hooks-without-push silently ignored, non-zero exit propagation, timeout handling, output truncation at 8KB, capability-manifest discovery regression, infrastructure role-gating regression. Full suite 90 passed, 1 skipped.
  
  2. agentic_ai_context#241 — TOKENOMICS_GAS_RESTRUCTURE_PLAN.md resume tracker: PR-final-2 ✅. RESUME HERE pointer rewritten with 'Original PR sequence COMPLETE' callout and notes the held-EC2-deploy status. Operator pre-flight remaining (1 mirror mint, 13 orphan dispositions, shared-helpers canonicalisation) reframed as 'no longer blocking — purely cleanup'.
  
  PR-2..PR-N (structural restructure of multi-scriptId thematic folders) stays operator-decision-paced and fully decoupled from both the deploy flow AND the autopilot tool. No structural rush.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
